load_balancer_arn.description: The ARN of the load balancer

port.description: The port on which the load balancer is listening

protocol.description: The protocol for connections from clients to the load balancer

tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

default_action.description: The default action for the listener
default_action.type: list(object({type: string, target_group_arn: string, order: number, redirect: list(object({host: string, path: string, port: string, protocol: string, query: string, status_code: string})), fixed_response: list(object({content_type: string, message_body: string, status_code: string}))}))

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the default SSL server certificate
